calendar.matters: Verified Probate Petition 17200, 850, Breach 16420 By Trust Directors, 850, Wic 15610.07 Bpc 22256-7, Gov 11350, Civ223-4 For Relief By Constructive Trust, Recovery Of Personal Property, Trustee Compensation, Damages Etc

Verified Probate Petition 17200, 850, Breach 16420 By Trust Directors, 850, Wic 15610.07 Bpc 22256-7, Gov 11350, Civ223-4 For Relief By Constructive Trust, Recovery Of Personal Property, Trustee Compensation, Damages Etc
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Martin appeared via zoom for (pro per).
Danyal Mico appeared via zoom for California Tax Education Council (objector).

Mr. Martin stated that he has the receipts for the filing, that the filings turned out to be incorrect, and that he will re-file.

The matter is continued to June 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Verified Probate Petition 17200, 850, Breach 16420 By Trust Directors, 850, Wic 15610.07 Bpc 22256-7, Gov 11350, Civ223-4 For Relief By Constructive Trust, Recovery Of Personal Property, Trustee Compensation, Damages Etc
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy James Martin appeared in person (pro per).
Danyal Mico appeared via zoom for California Tax Education Counsel.

Mr. Martin stated that he is in care court now he's asking the court for leniency, that he fell on hardship and cannot afford to pay for all the fees to serve parties.

The Court suggests going to the Access Center for assistance.

The matter is continued to May 11, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
